message:
feat(core): expand XOR filter proptest coverage to XorFilter16 and fix type annotations

Extend the property-based test suite from 8-bit XorFilter only to
full dual coverage of both XorFilter (8-bit) and XorFilter16 (16-bit)
variants, and fix type inference issues in the source module.

Source changes (xor_filter.rs):
- Change loop variable `n` from untyped 5000 to explicit `n: u64 = 5000`
  in fp_rate_large_sample and fp_rate_16bit_within_bounds tests, removing
  unnecessary `n as u64` casts in the range expressions

Test expansion (proptest_xor_filter.rs, +336 lines):
- Rename all existing 8-bit tests with `_8bit` suffix for clarity
- Add parallel XorFilter16 test suite: no_false_negatives_16bit,
  num_keys_is_unique_count_16bit, fp_rate_bounded_16bit (with tighter
  1/65535 ≈ 0.0015% theoretical bound, 0.5% test threshold),
  storage_efficiency_16bit, duplicate_handling_16bit,
  serde_roundtrip_16bit
- Add construction determinism tests for both variants (same input →
  identical fingerprint arrays)
- Add clone membership preservation tests (clone contains same keys)
- Add XorFilterStats coverage (bits_per_key, capacity reporting)
- Import XorFilter16 and XorFilterStats into test module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
